     The Numbers Business Report

The Wedding Ringer (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $64,460,211Details
International Box Office $15,711,385
Worldwide Box Office $80,171,596
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,244,008
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,588,704
Total $6,832,712
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Doug Harris is a loveable but socially awkward groom-to-be with a problem: he has no best man. With less than two weeks to go until he marries the girl of his dreams, Doug is referred to Jimmy Callahan, owner and CEO of Best Man, Inc., a company that provides flattering best men for socially challenged guys in need. What ensues is a hilarious wedding charade as they try to pull off the big con, and an unexpected budding bromance between Doug and his fake best man Jimmy.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$20,649,306 (32.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.12 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:80.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$23,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,003 opening theaters/3,003 max. theaters, 5.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $91,452,451

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 16th, 2015 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: January 22nd, 2015 (Wide) (Australia)
January 30th, 2015 (Wide) (Romania)
February 6th, 2015 (Wide) (South Africa)
February 19th, 2015 (Wide) (Lebanon)
February 19th, 2015 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
Video Release: April 28th, 2015 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for crude and sexual content, language throughout, some drug use and brief graphic nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2354, 12/24/2014)
Running Time: 101 minutes
Plot point: African Americans, False Identity, Romance
Social setting: Wedding Day, Wedding Planning
Subgenre: Buddy Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: LStar Capital, Will Packer Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Doug Harris is a loveable but socially awkward groom-to-be with a problem: he has no best man. With less than two weeks to go until he marries the girl of his dreams, Doug is referred to Jimmy Callahan, owner and CEO of Best Man, Inc., a company that provides flattering best men for socially challenged guys in need. What ensues is a hilarious wedding charade as they try to pull off the big con, and an unexpected budding bromance between Doug and his fake best man Jimmy.
